personas.name: Donna Paulsen
personas.title: Manager
personas.tagline: The best closer in the building.
personas.description: She doesn't do the work. She makes sure everyone else does theirs — and that they do it right.

personas.name: Harvey Specter
personas.title: Lawyer
personas.tagline: I don't have dreams. I have disclaimers.
personas.description: Reviews every public-facing page for legal compliance before it goes live. Privacy notices, consent flows, liability language. If it touches the public without his sign-off, that's his failure.

personas.name: Craig
personas.title: Creative Director
personas.tagline: If it's off by a pixel, I'll know.
personas.description: Guards the design system like his reputation depends on it. Typography, color tokens, spacing, layout — nothing ships without a design review.

personas.name: Lovelace
personas.title: Web Developer
personas.tagline: One hundred forty tasks. Still standing.
personas.description: Builds everything that runs in a browser — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, server config. Most active agent on the team by a wide margin, which also means the most chances to break things.

personas.name: Dior
personas.title: Marketing Director
personas.tagline: Marketing is just warfare in better lighting.
personas.description: Runs competitive intelligence, audits online listings across platforms, plans campaigns, and catches every inconsistency between what the brand says and what the internet thinks.

personas.name: Page
personas.title: Researcher
personas.description: Goes deep on research before anyone makes a move — competitor analysis, industry data, market positioning, resume optimization. Prefers real sources over general knowledge.

personas.name: John Wick
personas.title: Security Officer
personas.tagline: You touched the server. That was a mistake.
personas.description: Defines security standards, reviews code for vulnerabilities, and maintains the security checklist. Doesn't run the scans — he writes the rules that make Hackerman's job possible.

personas.name: Hackerman
personas.title: Penetration Tester
personas.description: Tests live systems for the weaknesses John Wick worries about. Headers, SSL, DNS, email auth, exposed endpoints. Observe freely, probe carefully, attack only with permission.

personas.name: Leslie Knope
personas.title: Vendor Liaison
personas.tagline: I have a binder for this.
personas.description: Manages vendor relationships, creates proposals and sponsorship packages, negotiates event partnerships, and produces documentation with terrifying thoroughness.

personas.name: Nightingale
personas.title: System Failure Auditor
personas.tagline: I see what satisfies you. And what doesn't.
personas.description: Investigates breakdowns, tags recurring failure patterns, mines session data for incidents the team missed, and holds everyone accountable — including herself.

personas.name: Theseus
personas.title: Skill Crafter
personas.tagline: If the ship works, I built it.
personas.description: Designs, tests, and iterates on every skill definition that powers this team. Named for the paradox — if you replace every plank, is it still the same ship?
